noTouch: SDK runtime internals beyond typed imports

checks.browser: skip: Next.js-compatible route helper uses standard Request/Response tests; no browser UI in scope

downshiftProof: route-local because the slice is limited to a deterministic Next.js API route example, tests, docs, and manifest; it uses fake SDK clients and standard Request/Response without real network, deployment, Docker, sponsor keys, or secrets
knownFailures: Initial route test failed with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND before gaskit-route.ts existed; expected TDD red state.
notes: Adds a maintained Next.js-compatible API route example for reserve/execute endpoints. The helper keeps credentials server-side, rejects malformed request bodies before SDK calls, forwards only allowlisted SDK fields, and returns only safe reservation/execution/error fields.
